# ACP-RISK-2.0 Test Vectors

**Spec:** ACP-RISK-2.0
**Count:** 65 vectors (40 positive + 25 negative)
**Generated by:** `impl/go/cmd/gen-risk2-vectors/main.go`

---

## ⚠️ Important: Unsigned Vectors

These vectors **intentionally do not contain Ed25519 signatures**. They test the deterministic risk formula only — not the cryptographic pipeline.

The existing 73 signed vectors in `compliance/test-vectors/` cover cryptographic validity. These vectors complement them by providing exhaustive coverage of:

- Risk score arithmetic (all factor combinations)
- Decision threshold behavior per autonomy level
- F_anom rule boundaries (exact count thresholds)
- Cooldown state propagation
- Anti-gaming pattern detection

> **Paper note:** *"ACP-RISK-2.0 unsigned vectors test the deterministic scoring function. They do not test cryptographic validity, which is covered by the 73 signed vectors in compliance/test-vectors/."*

---

## Vector Structure

```json
{
  "meta": {
    "id": "TS-RISK2-POS-001",
    "layer": "RISK2",
    "severity": "mandatory",
    "acp_version": "2.0",
    "spec": "ACP-RISK-2.0",
    "conformance_level": "L2",
    "description": "...",
    "note": "Unsigned — formula test only"
  },
  "policy": {
    "autonomy_level": 2,
    "approved_max": 39,
    "escalated_max": 69,
    "anomaly_rule1_threshold_n": 10,
    "anomaly_rule2_threshold_x": 3,
    "anomaly_rule3_threshold_y": 3,
    "cooldown_trigger_denials": 3,
    "cooldown_period_seconds": 300,
    "policy_hash": "sha256:test-policy-v1-default"
  },
  "input": {
    "agent_id": "acp:agent:org.example:agent-001",
    "capability": "acp:cap:data.read",
    "resource": "org.example/reports/Q1",
    "resource_class": "public",
    "context": { "external_ip": false, "off_hours": false, "non_business_day": false,
                 "geo_outside": false, "timestamp_drift": false, "untrusted_device": false },
    "history": { "denial_rate_high": false, "unresolved_escalations": false, "recent_denial": false,
                 "freq_anomaly": false, "amount_near_limit": false, "no_history": false },
    "anomaly": { "rule1_count": 0, "rule2_count": 0, "rule3_count": 0, "cooldown_active": false }
  },
  "expected": {
    "factors": { "base": 0, "context": 0, "history": 0, "resource": 0, "anomaly": 0 },
    "rs_raw": 0,
    "rs_final": 0,
    "decision": "APPROVED",
    "anomaly_detail": { "rule1_triggered": false, "rule2_triggered": false, "rule3_triggered": false },
    "denied_reason": ""
  }
}
```

---

## Baseline Assumptions (consistent across all vectors)

| Component | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| `*.read` / `*.monitor` | B=0 |
| `*.write` | B=10 |
| `financial.payment` | B=35 |
| `financial.transfer` | B=40 |
| `infrastructure.delete` | B=55 |
| `agent.revoke` | B=40 |
| unknown capability | B=40 |
| resource: public | F_res=0 |
| resource: internal | F_res=5 |
| resource: sensitive | F_res=15 |
| resource: critical | F_res=30 |
| resource: restricted | F_res=45 |
| external_ip | F_ctx=+20 |
| off_hours | F_ctx=+15 |
| non_business_day | F_ctx=+10 |
| geo_outside | F_ctx=+25 |
| timestamp_drift | F_ctx=+30 |
| untrusted_device | F_ctx=+10 |
| denial_rate_high | F_hist=+15 |
| unresolved_escalations | F_hist=+10 |
| recent_denial | F_hist=+20 |
| freq_anomaly | F_hist=+15 |
| amount_near_limit | F_hist=+20 |
| no_history | F_hist=+10 |
| F_anom Rule 1 triggered | +20 |
| F_anom Rule 2 triggered | +15 |
| F_anom Rule 3 triggered | +15 |

**Autonomy level 2 (default):** ≤39 → APPROVED / 40-69 → ESCALATED / ≥70 → DENIED

---

## Block Organization

| Block | Vectors | Focus |
|-------|---------|-------|
| 1 | POS-001 – POS-010 | Base: capability × resource |
| 2 | POS-011 – POS-020 | Context factors |
| 3 | POS-021 – POS-030 | History factors |
| 4 | POS-031 – POS-040 | F_anom rules + boundaries |
| 5 | MIX-001 – MIX-010 | Complex combinations |
| 6 | NEG-001 – NEG-015 | Anti-gaming, cooldown, autonomy overrides, error codes |
